title: Per-Fee-Recipient Validator Count Distribution
why_now: This slice showed a 37.4:1 validator-to-fee-recipient aggregation ratio but only bounded the distribution. A GROUP BY on fee_recipient would reveal the exact distribution shape, top-N operator share, and the precise HHI — replacing estimates with ground truth.

title: Per-Validator Relay Registration Breadth Distribution
why_now: This slice computed average registration breadth (6.35/9) but the distribution could be bimodal — solo stakers may register with fewer relays while pools register comprehensively. GROUP BY on validator pubkey would reveal the actual breadth distribution and identify under-registered validator cohorts.

title: Fee-Recipient-to-Builder Delivery Concentration
why_now: This slice identified builder dependency as the primary concentration risk but did not join validator registrations to delivered payloads. Joining on proposer_fee_recipient would reveal which builder(s) each large staking pool actually receives blocks from — measuring realized dependency rather than market-level estimates.
